parameters: const nickname = args[0]; const apiRequest = Functions.makeHttpRequest({ url: `http://103.76.120.189/stats/${nickname}` }); const apiResponse = await apiRequest; if (apiResponse.error) { throw Error('API Error'); } const { total_games, kills, deaths, assists } = apiResponse.data; const packedData = (BigInt(total_games) << 192n) | (BigInt(kills) << 128n) | (BigInt(deaths) << 64n) | BigInt(assists); return Functions.encodeUint256(packedData);
